title: bidens artemisiifolia f. rubra
intro: Bidens artemisiifolia f. rubra, also known as the red beggar lice, is a subspecies of the Bidens artemisiifolia plant, which is a flowering plant in the aster family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Bidens artemisiifolia f. rubra include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antihistamine and a diuretic. Bidens artemisiifolia f. rubra can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
